data.title: HUB Cyber Security Acquires Evofem Notes in All-Stock Deal as Part of Wider Restructuring
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Hub ( (HUBC) ) has provided an announcement.

On June 26, 2026, HUB Cyber Security Ltd. agreed to acquire all of certain investors’ senior subordinated convertible notes and purchase rights in Evofem Biosciences Inc., paying an aggregate purchase price of about $49.3 million in newly issued ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants. The acquired instruments could be converted or exercised into roughly 1.01 billion Evofem shares, potentially giving HUB about 88% ownership of Evofem’s current outstanding stock, while HUB shareholders must still approve full warrant exercise and an increase in authorized share capital.

To consummate the deal, HUB issued approximately 31.6 million consideration shares, structuring most of them as pre-funded warrants to keep individual holders below a 4.99% ownership cap, with plans to lift that limit after shareholder approval. The transaction, announced on July 1, 2026, forms part of a wider restructuring in which HUB has cut operating expenses, halved headcount at the HUB level and engaged Deloitte, positioning the Evofem investment as an initial disciplined step in pursuing strategic opportunities while preserving liquidity and seeking to enhance shareholder value.

Spark’s Take on HUBC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HUBC is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by severe financial weakness (declining revenue, ongoing losses, negative equity, and negative free cash flow). Technicals add further downside pressure as the stock trades well below all key moving averages with bearish momentum. Valuation does not provide support due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on HUBC stock,
click here.

More about Hub

HUB Cyber Security Ltd. is an Israel-based cybersecurity company focused on providing advanced cyber protection solutions and services to enterprises and government clients. The company is listed on the Nasdaq Stock Market and has recently undertaken a broad restructuring to improve liquidity, streamline its organizational structure and reinforce corporate governance as it seeks sustainable growth.

Average Trading Volume: 4,521,146

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.59M

data.title: CollPlant Biotechnologies Raises $2.6 Million via Private Placement to Fund R&D and Strategic Deals
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Collplant Holdings ( (CLGN) ).

On June 29, 2026, CollPlant Biotechnologies entered a definitive securities purchase agreement for a $2.6 million private placement of 7,647,061 ordinary shares or equivalents, along with series A and series B warrants priced at $0.34 per unit, with closing expected around July 1, 2026. H.C. Wainwright & Co. is acting as exclusive placement agent, and CollPlant plans to use the net proceeds for working capital, research and development, and to continue evaluating strategic business combinations including potential acquisitions and joint ventures, a move that bolsters its funding base as it advances its rhCollagen-based pipeline and strategic options.

The financing structure includes pre-funded and unregistered warrants with exercise prices aligned to the offering price and varying terms, plus investor participation rights in future financings and restrictions on CollPlant’s ability to pursue variable-rate transactions for one year. These terms, together with resale registration commitments and placement agent compensation via cash fees and additional warrants, underscore the company’s reliance on capital markets to support operations while giving institutional investors leveraged exposure to potential upside in its regenerative and aesthetics programs.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from GreenPower Motor ( (GP) ).

On June 30, 2026, GreenPower Motor Company completed the third tranche of its Series A Convertible Preferred Share financing, issuing 1,500 preferred shares in a private placement for gross proceeds of US$1.425 million with an institutional investor under a previously established facility. On the same date, the company and the investor amended their agreement to increase the aggregate stated value of Series A Convertible Preferred Shares issuable by US$2 million, bolstering GreenPower’s funding capacity as it pursues its electric commercial vehicle strategy and supports ongoing operations.

Each Series A Convertible Preferred Share can be converted into common shares based on a formula tied to 105% of stated value and 125% of the prior day’s NASDAQ closing price, providing structured equity-linked financing while managing potential dilution. GreenPower will pay a 5% cash placement fee on the offering proceeds to Digital Offering LLC, underscoring the company’s continued use of capital markets and advisory channels to secure growth funding amid competitive pressure in the zero-emission commercial vehicle industry.

data.title: SiTime Finalizes Renesas Timing Acquisition and New Credit Facility
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest update is out from SiTime Corporation ( (SITM) ).

SiTime has completed its acquisition of Renesas Electronics’ timing business, announced earlier in February 2026, securing a leading clocking brand with a 30-year legacy and a customer base of more than 10,000 accounts heavily concentrated in AI datacenter and communications. The acquired business, which historically generated around 70% gross margins, is expected to significantly expand SiTime’s clocking portfolio, enhance its presence in data center, industrial and automotive markets, and accelerate its trajectory toward $1 billion in revenue while supporting a strategic collaboration to integrate SiTime’s MEMS resonators into Renesas’ embedded computing products.

To support its enlarged operations, SiTime entered into a new $200 million senior secured revolving credit facility on June 30, 2026, providing flexible working capital with leverage and interest coverage covenants and the ability to expand borrowing capacity through additional commitments. The company also implemented a transition services agreement with Renesas to ensure operational continuity of the acquired business, granted Renesas registration rights for resales of SiTime shares and a board seat for Renesas CEO Hidetoshi Shibata, and adopted a deferred compensation plan effective July 1, 2026 for directors and select employees to defer cash and equity-based pay, collectively reshaping its capital structure, governance and executive compensation framework following the acquisition.

The most recent analyst rating on (SITM) stock is a Buy
with a $900.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SiTime Corporation stock,
see the SITM Stock Forecast page.

More about SiTime Corporation

SiTime Corporation is a semiconductor company focused on precision timing solutions based on MEMS technology, supplying programmable oscillators, clocks and resonators that offer higher performance, smaller size, lower power and greater reliability than traditional quartz-based devices. The company targets high-growth markets including AI data centers, communications, industrial, automotive, mobile, wearables, IoT and advanced robotics, and reports more than 4 billion devices shipped across over 400 applications.

data.title: Alight Executes Reverse Stock Split and Governance Changes
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest update is out from Alight ( (ALIT) ).

At its June 10, 2026 annual meeting, Alight stockholders approved several charter amendments, including declassification of the board and the extension of Delaware-style exculpation protections to certain officers, and authorized a reverse stock split paired with a reduction in authorized share counts across all common stock classes. The company subsequently filed charter amendments and a restated charter in Delaware, and its board updated bylaws to align with the new structure, tighten advance notice and universal proxy procedures, and reserve white proxy cards for board use.

Effective June 30, 2026, Alight implemented a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its Class A, Class B non-voting, and Class V shares, proportionately cutting authorized common share amounts while leaving preferred stock authorization unchanged and paying cash instead of issuing fractional shares. The move, which preserves each investor’s relative voting stake and adjusts equity awards and registered securities accordingly, positions the stock to trade on a split-adjusted basis on the NYSE from July 1, 2026, and is likely aimed at improving share price optics and capital markets flexibility for existing and prospective shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (ALIT) stock is a Buy
with a $3.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alight stock,
see the ALIT Stock Forecast page.

ALIT scores below average primarily due to deteriorating profitability (large losses and compressed margins) and bearish technicals with the stock well below major moving averages. On July 1, 2026, Talos Production Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Talos Energy, launched a private offering of $800 million in second-priority senior secured notes due 2034 to eligible investors, with the deal exempt from U.S. securities registration rules. The company simultaneously disclosed financial and operational information tied to its pending purchase of oil and gas properties in the Mississippi Canyon area of the Gulf of America, including interests in the Na Kika and Coulomb deepwater producing assets, underscoring a capital-intensive expansion of its offshore portfolio and a shift toward operating the Coulomb field.

The financing is closely linked to a June 30, 2026 purchase and sale agreement under which Talos Ocho and an affiliate of Ridgewood Energy will each acquire a 50% stake in the specified assets from Shell Offshore, with Talos Ocho set to become operator of Coulomb. data.title: PMGC Advances AI-Driven Muscle Drug Discovery Program
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

PMGC Holdings ( (ELAB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, NorthStrive Biosciences reported positive Phase III results from its AI-driven drug discovery collaboration with Yuva Biosciences, focused on muscle preservation and metabolic stress. The study used Yuva’s MitoNova AI platform to select small molecules tested in primary human skeletal muscle cells, with four compounds significantly increasing ANT1, a mitochondrial protein central to skeletal muscle energy metabolism.

The strongest candidates showed dose-dependent ANT1 induction of up to about 50%, validating the biological activity of multiple AI-selected molecules in vitro and supporting advancement into more mature skeletal muscle models. The outcome bolsters PMGC’s push into AI-enabled biopharmaceutical R&D and strengthens NorthStrive’s muscle-preservation strategy, though the company stresses the findings are preliminary and that efficacy in advanced models, animal studies and clinical settings remains unproven.

Phase III had been flagged in earlier updates as a key test of Yuva’s sixth-generation classifier models, and delivering the anticipated results in mid-2026 may enhance confidence among stakeholders in the platform’s predictive capabilities. For PMGC and NorthStrive, the data provide a clearer pipeline path but also underscore ongoing scientific and regulatory risks, as there is no assurance the validated compounds will translate into approved or revenue-generating products.

Spark’s Take on ELAB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELAB is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality (deep losses, thin margins, and ongoing cash burn with rising leverage) and bearish technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend, while corporate events are a modest offset given positive strategic announcements but with execution and dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on ELAB stock,
click here.

More about PMGC Holdings

NorthStrive Biosciences Inc., a subsidiary of diversified holding company PMGC Holdings Inc., is a biopharmaceutical business focused on developing and acquiring aesthetic medicines. Its lead asset, EL-22, uses an engineered probiotic approach aimed at preserving muscle in patients on weight-loss therapies such as GLP-1 receptor agonists, aligning the company with the growing market for metabolic and body-composition treatments.

PMGC Holdings manages a portfolio of businesses across multiple industries through strategic acquisitions, investments and development initiatives. NorthStrive’s collaboration with mitochondrial sciences AI specialist Yuva Biosciences, whose MitoNova platform is already used in commercial products, underscores PMGC’s push into AI-enabled life sciences and muscle health applications.

NorthStrive’s industry positioning reflects a strategy to marry AI-driven discovery with aesthetic and metabolic health needs. By targeting muscle preservation amid the rapid adoption of GLP-1 drugs, the company is seeking a differentiated niche at the intersection of weight-loss therapeutics, longevity science and consumer-focused aesthetics.

Average Trading Volume: 4,251,646

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.5M

Learn more about ELAB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Zeo ScientifiX ( (ZEOX) ) has issued an update.

On July 1, 2026, ZEO ScientifiX, Inc., a biologics research and products company focused on regenerative medicine and physician education, announced plans to host a live virtual educational webinar for healthcare professionals titled “One Year Later, Three States Stronger: The Southeast Regen Revolution.” The company, which operates out of Nova Southeastern University’s Center of Collaborative Research, develops regenerative biologics and therapies for clinicians seeking to integrate advanced regenerative medicine into their practices.

Scheduled for July 22, 2026, at 6:45 p.m. Eastern Time, the webinar will examine lessons from Florida’s first year under its pioneering stem cell law and discuss similar new laws in Tennessee and Georgia, highlighting implications for healthcare providers as regenerative medicine expands across the Southeast. Hosted by General Manager Sean Vega-Stanton, M.D., and featuring scientific, medical, and regulatory experts from ZEO ScientifiX, the program underscores the company’s effort to strengthen its role as an educational and regulatory resource in a rapidly evolving regenerative medicine landscape.

data.title: Stellar Bancorp Completes Merger into Prosperity Bancshares
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Stellar Bancorp ( (STEL) ) has issued an update.

On July 1, 2026, Stellar Bancorp merged into Prosperity Bancshares, with Prosperity emerging as the surviving corporation and Stellar Bank simultaneously combining into Prosperity Bank. The all-stock-and-cash deal converted Stellar shares into Prosperity shares plus cash, cancelled or cashed out Stellar equity awards under defined terms, and resulted in Stellar’s board and executives stepping down, with two Stellar directors joining Prosperity’s board.

Ahead of the closing, Stellar arranged for its stock to be suspended and delisted from the NYSE effective July 1, 2026, and Prosperity, as successor, plans to terminate Stellar’s SEC registration and reporting obligations. In conjunction with the transaction, Stellar executed a balance sheet repositioning, selling about $466.4 million of securities by June 30, 2026, a move likely aimed at optimizing the combined bank’s asset mix and capital profile for the enlarged franchise and its stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (STEL) stock is a Buy
with a $44.00 price target.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial quality (strong cash generation and conservative balance sheet) despite a notable TTM revenue contraction. Prosperity Bancshares, Inc., also a Texas banking company, operates Prosperity Bank, positioning itself as a larger regional player in the U.S. banking sector through acquisitions and consolidation.

data.title: Precision BioSciences Advances Gene-Editing Programs in Hepatitis B
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Precision BioSciences ( (DTIL) ).

Precision BioSciences, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing gene-editing therapies targeting serious chronic and genetic diseases. Its pipeline includes programs for chronic hepatitis B and Duchenne muscular dystrophy, positioning the firm in the competitive field of genomic medicines for high-unmet-need patient populations.

The company’s updated corporate deck highlights clinical data from the ELIMINATE-B study for chronic hepatitis B, where PBGENE-HBV showed liver biopsy evidence of directly eliminating cccDNA and achieving a 1-log reduction in cccDNA-derived transcripts. Precision also disclosed that a second clinical site at Washington University School of Medicine in St. Louis has been activated for the FUNCTION-DMD trial of PBGENE-DMD in Duchenne muscular dystrophy, with both programs aiming for initial or next data updates around year-end 2026, signaling steady advancement of its gene-editing pipeline.

data.title: Prosperity Bancshares Completes Acquisition of Stellar Bancorp
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Prosperity Bancshares ( (PB) ) is now available.

On July 1, 2026, Prosperity Bancshares completed its previously announced acquisition of Stellar Bancorp, folding Stellar into Prosperity and merging Stellar Bank into Prosperity Bank, with Prosperity as the surviving entities. The roughly $590 million cash component and issuance of about 19 million Prosperity shares expand Prosperity’s Texas footprint, while Stellar’s approximately $2.17 billion in Federal Home Loan Bank obligations were assumed, and Stellar branches will keep their name until operational integration slated for March 2027.

As part of the transaction, Stellar shareholders received 0.3803 Prosperity shares plus $11.36 in cash per share, and Stellar equity awards were cashed out or converted under specified terms. Former Stellar executives gained prominent roles in the combined company: Robert R. Franklin Jr. and Joe B. Swinbank joined Prosperity’s board, Franklin became Vice Chairman of Prosperity and Prosperity Bank under a three-year employment deal with significant salary, bonus and equity, and other Stellar leaders, including Ramon Vitulli, assumed key regional leadership posts, reinforcing continuity for customers and investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (PB) stock is a Buy
with a $85.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prosperity Bancshares stock,
see the PB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PB is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects solid underlying financial performance and reasonable valuation, partially offset by weak technical momentum. The latest earnings call was balanced: constructive margin/efficiency targets and capital returns, but meaningful near-term headwinds from integration costs, elevated expenses, and the quarter’s asset-quality shock.

To see Spark’s full report on PB stock,
click here.

More about Prosperity Bancshares

Prosperity Bancshares, Inc. is a Houston-based regional financial holding company providing personal and commercial banking services across Texas and Oklahoma. Founded in 1983, it offers traditional deposit and loan products alongside digital banking, cards, mortgage services, retail brokerage, trust and wealth management, and treasury management, operating more than 300 full-service locations as of mid-2026.

The bank’s network spans major Texas markets including Houston, Dallas/Fort Worth, Central and West Texas, as well as Central and Tulsa, Oklahoma, with certain locations operating under American Bank and Texas Partners Bank brands. Prosperity follows a community banking model, emphasizing local relationships with consumers and businesses and tailoring financial solutions to regional markets.

data.title: Metallus Secures New Long-Term $300 Million Credit Facility
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Metallus ( (MTUS) ) has shared an announcement.

On June 30, 2026, Metallus Inc. and certain domestic subsidiaries executed a Fifth Amended and Restated Credit Agreement that replaces a prior secured facility with a $300 million asset-based revolving credit line, including sublimits for letters of credit and swingline loans. The borrowing base is tied to eligible receivables, inventory and equipment, and the debt is guaranteed by key domestic subsidiaries and secured by substantially all personal property.

The agreement allows Metallus to request up to $200 million in additional commitments and a separate first-in, last-out tranche of up to $30 million, while setting interest rates based on either an alternate base rate or adjusted term SOFR plus a margin. Maturing on June 30, 2031, the facility includes covenants on leverage, investments and distributions, mandatory prepayments from certain transactions and customary default provisions, giving the company expanded, longer-dated liquidity for working capital, capital spending and acquisitions while imposing strict financial and operational discipline demanded by lenders.

The most recent analyst rating on (MTUS) stock is a Sell
with a $18.00 price target.

MTUS scores as a moderate setup: the strongest positives are a very conservative balance sheet and an earnings call pointing to improving shipments/EBITDA with a sharply expanded order book and operational capacity gains. Offsetting these are persistently weak cash conversion (negative TTM free cash flow) and thin margins, while valuation is relatively high (P/E ~31.5) and technicals are more neutral than strongly bullish.

The company relies on secured, asset-based credit facilities backed by receivables, inventory and machinery to fund its ongoing operations and strategic initiatives.

On July 1, 2026, 707 Cayman Holdings Limited said its board had approved the exploration of a next-generation digital platform combining artificial intelligence, blockchain traceability and a crypto payment pilot to digitalise its global apparel supply chain. The planned platform targets customer demand for transparency, faster replenishment and verifiable ESG credentials, particularly from European and North American clients.

Management outlined an indicative three-year investment of US$10 million to US$12 million across phased rollouts of AI-driven supply-chain optimisation, AI design tools, blockchain-based provenance tracking and a crypto settlement pilot, but stressed that no capital expenditure has been committed yet. data.title: Alcoa to Acquire South32 Aluminum Assets Worldwide
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest update is out from Alcoa ( (AA) ).

On June 30, 2026, Alcoa announced a definitive agreement to acquire South32’s interests in key bauxite mines, alumina refineries, and aluminum smelters in Australia, Brazil, and South Africa for approximately $4.1 billion in cash and stock, implying an enterprise value of about $4.7 billion. The deal structure includes a contingent value right of up to $750 million tied to future alumina and aluminum prices, with Alcoa securing a $3.1 billion bridge financing commitment and South32 planning to distribute at least half of the received Alcoa shares to its own investors.

The acquisition is expected to expand Alcoa’s global footprint, add high-quality low-cost assets, and lift pro forma 2025 production to 3.2 million metric tons of aluminum and 14.8 million metric tons of alumina, reinforcing its position as a leading alumina and aluminum producer. Management projects around $900 million in net present value synergies, immediate accretion to earnings per share and free cash flow, and improved cost-curve positioning, while highlighting benefits for supply security, regional industrial capacity, and jobs in Australia, Brazil, and South Africa.
